forager.model

Class FixedObject

  • java.lang.Object
    • forager.model.FixedObject
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    QuadTreeElement
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    Harvestable, Wall

    public abstract class FixedObject
extends Object
implements QuadTreeElement
    An object who can't move. A ressource or an obstacle.
    Author:
    Guillaume Desquesnes
